strategy: Do NOT change the Equalize global — if you do, he Tower Shields and his Deer Knight lands its full 100,000 Moon damage uncapped, wiping you.
The Equalize caps ALL damage: 500 on round 1, 1,000 on round 3, 2,000 on round 5, 4,000 on round 7 — his Deer Knight each round is capped to the same value.
Every hit you land is capped too, so there's no reward for over-blading early — land a capped hit each round and let the cap climb.
From rounds 5-7, when the cap is 2,000-4,000, use your big hits to close out his 10,640 health.
He resists all schools 40% with no boost, so use your strongest reliable hit and stay shielded against the Deer Knight.
cheatNotes: Arriving late after round 2 gets you a Ship of Fools for 100,000 Moon (capped only by the current Equalize) — be on time.
His damage is held down by the Equalize global until someone changes it.
Round 1 he sets the damage cap to 500.
Change the global and he Tower Shields himself — never do it.
Changing it also lets his Deer Knight deal full uncapped damage amplified by his outboost — a wipe.
Every round he fires a Deer Knight that would hit for 100,000 but is capped to the current Equalize value.
Round 7 the cap rises to 4,000 — your burst window.
